description: The manufacturing team needs to set up a Bill of Materials (BOM) for a new product assembly. Log into Apache OFBiz (admin / ofbiz). First, navigate to the Catalog Manager and create a new product with Product ID 'GIZMO-KIT-01', Product Name 'Gizmo Starter Kit', Product Type 'Finished Good', and Internal Name 'Gizmo Starter Kit Bundle'. Save the product. Then navigate to the Manufacturing module and create a new Bill of Materials (BOM) for 'GIZMO-KIT-01'. The BOM should include the following components: 2 units of 'Tiny Gizmo' (GZ-1000) and 1 unit of 'Round Gizmo' (GZ-2644). Save the BOM. The task is complete when the product 'GIZMO-KIT-01' exists in the catalog and its BOM lists both component products with the correct quantities.

metadata.data_source: Apache OFBiz built-in demo data (component products from DemoProduct.xml)
